system.description:
Requirement: A minimum of 2 characters must participate.

Time: Choose a number of days — the benefit lasts for each day spent on this activity.

Parties can boost their group morale by holding friendly competitions, using Acrobatics, Athletics, or attack rolls. The competitions could be rope climbing, a relay of some type, knife throwing, etc. Any number of adventurers may undertake this activity together, making a group check for success.

journeyProperties.criticalFailure: All involved characters lose an inspiration. Characters without inspiration instead gain a level of strife.
journeyProperties.failure: The adventurers do not improve their morale.
journeyProperties.success: All involved adventurers gain an expertise die on any saving throws or checks vs fear or the frightened condition for the days spent on the activity.
journeyProperties.criticalSuccess: As success, but all involved adventurers also gain an inspiration.
